# GitHub Copilot Prompts

Below are some useful prompts for working with GitHub Copilot:

## Code Generation

- Generate a function to parse JSON data from an API response
- Create a utility class for handling file operations in Python
- Write a React component for a data visualization dashboard
- Implement error handling for database connections

## Code Improvement

- Refactor this code to improve performance
- Optimize this algorithm for better time complexity
- Convert this imperative code to a functional programming style
- Add proper error handling to this function

## Documentation

- Write JSDoc comments for this function
- Create a README template for a new project
- Document the API endpoints for this service
- Generate inline comments explaining complex logic

## Testing

- Write unit tests for this function
- Create a test suite for this API endpoint
- Generate mock data for testing this component
- Write integration tests for this module

## Debugging

- Help me debug this error message
- What might be causing this memory leak?
- How can I fix this performance bottleneck?
- Identify potential security vulnerabilities in this code
